Attendee prep · Claude Code one-day intensive training

Get ready for your Claude Code one-day intensive training.

Internet Brands is rolling out Claude Code across its engineering teams, and this hands-on, one-day session helps you use it well in everyday work, with less theory and more reusable operating patterns you can apply right away. This page explains who is running it, why, what to expect, and the two things to do before we meet.

Who is Closedloop.ai?

Closedloop.ai has been building AI products for the past eight years. Over the last year, our engineering team has spent significant time developing and refining agentic software development workflows, learning what works, what doesn’t, and how to use tools like Claude Code effectively in production.

This training is an opportunity to share those lessons learned and help your team come up to speed faster than we did. Throughout this page, “we” refers to the Closedloop.ai team leading the training.

Your required pre-work

Complete this before the live session so we can spend the five hours practicing, not repairing setup.

Claude Code launches successfully
Git and Python 3 are installed
Training repo is cloned locally
Repo opens in terminal and IDE
Demo app tests run successfully
Baseline permissions posture understood

Start your pre-work now

Come ready so we spend our time building, not fixing setup. Open these and run the checklist before we meet.

1 · Setup & pre-work checklistGet your machine ready (~15 min)

Your trainers

Mike Angstadt
VP of Engineering · Closedloop.ai
Focused on making agentic development practical, governed, and valuable for real engineering teams.
#1
Daniel Ochoa
Agentic Development Lead · Closedloop.ai
Leads hands-on patterns for Claude Code workflows, skills, agents, evidence, and review loops.

Why Closedloop.ai was selected: we use Claude Code in production every day. On Pensero, the engineering-productivity benchmark Internet Brands also uses, our team ranks among the top performers, and Daniel is its #1-ranked contributor. Over the last 12 months we’ve sped up our own delivery roughly 16× using the same habits this course teaches, across product, retail, infrastructure, healthcare, and developer-platform codebases.

PenseroTop 10Team
Pensero#1Contributor

Come ready to build

  • A Claude Code primitive kit: command, skill, agent, and safe tool posture.
  • A compact plan that survives handoff and compaction.
  • Evidence-first investigation and review artifacts.
  • A workflow you can reuse after the training.

This is a hands-on session, not a documentation walkthrough. We’ll focus on the workflows and operating patterns our engineers use every day: managing context, gathering evidence before making changes, reviewing work against a plan, and building repeatable development processes.

Closedloop.ai · Claude Code One-Day Intensive
Arrive ready: repo cloned, tests passing, terminal + IDE open.
